sections.paragraph: & עֹבַדְיָה m. (“worshipper of Jehovah”), compare Arab. عبد الله), [Obadiah], pr.n. of several men, the most celebrated of whom is the prophet of this name, contemporary with Jeremiah ( Oba 1:1), 1Ki 18:3 1Ch 3:21 7:3 8:38 9:16 , 44 1Ch 9:44 12:9 27:19 2Ch 17:7 34:12 Ezr 8:9 Neh 10:6. LXX. Ἀβδίας (which is properly from עַבְדִּיָּה).
